translated_text: I've been exploring God lately maybe due to covid-19. It's easy to ask why God lets this happen or agree with those who say "He" is incompetent. Did God tell those poachers to trade pangolins or those restaurants to cook bats? Free will is enough to explain that God is a concept.
Just a Pangolin casually tearing a wall to pieces. Imagine putting the personality of a Honey Badger into a Pangolin! They'd fuck shit right up.

I agree. The press/media should be analysing why it occurred. Real journalistic rigour, so we know better in future. Is it bat/pangolin soup? Proximity to pigs/other domestic animals? Is it bio-security labs in Wuhan? Is Italy's outbreak linked to Wuhan-based textile workers?
